title: engellaria obtusa
intro: Engellaria obtusa, also known as the "Malaysian Periwinkle", is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of microorganisms and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Engellaria obtusa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases and promote overall well-being. Engellaria obtusa is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
